---
title: About Me
---

Hello, I’m Saori Kikuchi.

I have over 15 years of experience in accounting and finance, including financial reporting, budgeting, and ERP system implementation in international environments.

In recent years, I have developed a strong interest in data analytics and its application to finance.

## Career Goals

My goal is to transition into a role that combines finance and data analytics, particularly in FP&A or business analysis.

I aim to leverage my accounting background together with data-driven insights to improve financial performance and support strategic decision-making.

## Technical Skills

### Finance & Business Tools
- SAP
- JD Edwards
- D365
- Excel (Advanced)
- Power Query
- Power BI

### Data Analytics (Currently Developing)
- Python (pandas, data cleaning, basic analysis)
- SQL (basic querying)
- R (RStudio, basic statistical analysis)
- GitHub (version control)
- VS Code
